title: Knickerbocker Holiday
writer: Maxwell Anderson, Kurt Weill, Thomas Lennon
actors: Nelson Eddy, Charles Coburn, Constance Dowling
plot: It's 1650 in New Amsterdam, and Brom Broeck, a young outspoken newspaper publisher is arrested for printing advanced opinions on the undemocratic rule of Governor "Peg-Leg" Stuyvesant. While Brom is in prison, old "Peg-Leg" goes o...
